site.name: HEZHE

site.descriptionEn: Exploring the intersection of education and AI - Empowering education with AI, embracing the future of learning

author.name: Mark
bio: 教育学硕士 + AI工程师，致力于探索AI如何变革教育。
专注于 AI 应用、Prompt Engineering。
bioEn: Master of Education + AI Engineer, dedicated to exploring how AI can transform education.
Focused on AI in education, prompt engineering, and human-AI collaboration.

hero.title: 教育界的探索者 - 和喆
hero.subtitle: 探索 AI 与教育的融合，让每一个学习者都能受益于人工智能带来的变革
